articles.headline: Apple leans on Google Gemini for heavier Apple Intelligence tasks
articles.summary: Apple’s new AI architecture routes demanding requests to Google’s Gemini models while keeping lighter processing on-device. That matters for businesses because it signals a hybrid AI pattern that could shape enterprise device management, privacy expectations, and the economics of AI features across Apple’s ecosystem.

articles.headline: China reportedly prepares $295 billion AI infrastructure push
articles.summary: Reuters reports that China is preparing a five-year plan to spend about 2 trillion yuan on nationwide data-center buildout. For global businesses, that points to stronger AI infrastructure competition, possible shifts in chip and cloud demand, and more pressure on supply chains tied to compute and power capacity.

articles.headline: Weekly Intelligence Report highlights ransomware, vulnerabilities, and data leaks
articles.summary: CYFIRMA’s weekly report describes ransomware and leak activity affecting a transportation and logistics company in Singapore and a construction company in Japan. Those sectors are operationally important for many businesses, so the report is a reminder that supply-chain disruption and third-party cyber risk remain immediate business concerns.[5]
